service.name: Skyscanner Flights API
service.description_for_ai: Flight price search across 1200+ airlines. Live prices, price calendars, route suggestions. Used by millions of travelers. Requires partnership for full access. Use for flight price comparison, cheapest dates, route search.

auth.cost: Partnership required for production. Test environment available.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a flight search session and get live prices from airlines. Returns session ID for polling results.

query.description: {market: UK, locale: en-GB, currency: GBP, queryLegs: [{originPlaceId: {iata: LHR}, destinationPlaceId: {iata: JFK}, date: {year, month, day}}], adults: 1, cabinClass: CABIN_CLASS_ECONOMY}

agent_hints.iata_codes: Use standard IATA codes: LHR=London Heathrow, JFK=New York, SVO=Moscow Sheremetyevo
agent_hints.async: Create session → poll with session token until status=RESULT_STATUS_COMPLETE
